'''Pym''', also known as '''New Plympto''', was the [[Star/Legends|primary]] of the [[New Plympto system/Legends|New Plympto system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by four [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Star-stub}}
